changelog: v5.0.1: Benchmark accuracy restored. A v5.0.0 home-page animation kept running in the background after navigating away and stole GPU cycles from the FAST benchmark, depressing scores by about 17% on a 9800X3D / 4080 Super and 12% on a 9900KF / 2080 Ti; v5.0.1 pauses it when you leave the home page and scores recover their v4.1.x baseline. Every benchmark run now captures the GPU's starting core temperature (NVIDIA and AMD supported) shown on the results card and as a new START GPU column in Score History, making cold-vs-warm start conditions visible instead of a hidden confound. Composite score rings renamed from CPU-LIMITED / GPU-LIMITED to CPU-BOUND FPS / GPU-BOUND FPS with clearer subtitles that acknowledge competitive games can be either depending on settings and resolution; the verdict headline is softened from "is the limiting factor" to "has the biggest impact on CPU-bound / GPU-bound game FPS" and the how-scores-are-calculated table is fixed (was showing pre-recalibration weights with a removed Storage row).
